title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPAL DISTRICT OF TATARIKAN IN THE PROVINCE OF LANAO DEL SUR, TO PAGAYAWAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 363 / 59 OG No. 38, 6415 (September 23, 1963)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3624, June 22, 1963 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPAL DISTRICT OF TATARIKAN IN THE PROVINCE OF LANAO DEL SUR, TO PAGAYAWAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipal District; of Tatarikan in the Province of Lanao del Sur, is hereby changed to Pagayawan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1963.
